subject: English
chapter: A Slumber Did My Spirit Seal
author: William Wordsworth

activities_projects.title: Theme Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the deeper theme of the poem
steps: Read the poem carefully
Write a paragraph explaining the central theme

activities_projects.title: Emotional Tone
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the emotional tone of the poem
steps: Identify the poet’s feelings about death
Write how the tone changes in the poem

activities_projects.title: Imagery Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyse imagery used in the poem
steps: Find imagery related to nature
Explain how it contributes to meaning

activities_projects.title: Symbolism Interpretation
steps: Explain the symbolic meaning of 'earth's diurnal course'
Write a paragraph about its significance

activities_projects.title: Structure Analysis
steps: Observe the stanza pattern
Explain how the structure supports the theme

activities_projects.title: Poetic Devices
steps: Find at least two poetic devices
Explain how they enhance the poem

activities_projects.title: Title Interpretation
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the meaning of the title
steps: Explain how the title relates to the poem
Support your answer with examples

activities_projects.title: Philosophical Meaning
activities_projects.objective: Understand philosophical ideas in the poem
steps: Explain the poem’s view of life and death
Write a short paragraph

activities_projects.title: Critical Appreciation
steps: Write why the poem is meaningful
Explain its emotional impact

activities_projects.title: Personal Reflection
steps: Write your personal response to the poem
Explain what message you learned
